summary: Tested Rêv'dô one-page site (FastAPI + React). All 6 backend pytest cases passed (root, valid/minimal POST, validation 422, list with no _id leak). All 12 frontend Playwright assertions passed: hero, emergency banner, navbar, 11 service cards, floating WhatsApp, tel/mailto links, contact form validation and successful submission with success state toast.

minor.issue: Logger is referenced inside route handler (line 62) before logging.basicConfig/logger definition (lines 93-97). Works at runtime since handlers are called after module load, but logger should be initialized before use for cleanliness.
On internal exception returns generic 500 with French message — fine, but creation route uses response_model=QuoteRequest so any insertion failure path is broad.

action_items: Optional: Move logging.basicConfig and logger = logging.getLogger(__name__) above route definitions in server.py for clarity.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is small and focused — OK.
MongoDB _id correctly excluded via projection in GET list.
Pydantic validation with min_length=1 on required fields works correctly (422 on empty strings).
Frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL correctly, no hardcoded URLs.
All required data-testid attributes are present and functional.
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ inserted via POST /api/quote-request (Jean Dupont, Min, List, Playwright User). Not cleaned up — minimal volume.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 3 endpoints under /api: GET /, POST /api/quote-request, GET /api/quote-request. Frontend is one-page site with sections: hero, emergency-banner, services (11 cards), zone, why-us, gallery, contact, footer + floating WhatsApp. All data-testid attributes verified working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_quote_api.py can be reused as regression suite.
rca of the issue: No issues found — all features behave per spec.
